mnemonics: LIeberman's Algorithm is about LIes and Truths in Mechanism Design
keyPoints: Lieberman is a specific algorithm for computing optimal strategies in zero-sum games
It is an iterative algorithm that refines approximations to find the true value of the game
The algorithm converges to the value of the game and optimal strategies for both players
commonMistakes: Confusing Lieberman with fictitious play or other learning algorithms
Assuming it works for all game types (it's specifically for zero-sum games)
Forgetting that it requires iterative computation rather than providing an immediate closed-form solution
